name: Assertion-free test: CelebrationAnimation animated path
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L4-03] test renders with animations enabled but makes zero assertions; a bug firing onComplete synchronously would not be caught. Fix: assert onComplete not called, or delete with reason.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the CelebrationAnimation animated-path test renders with reduced motion disabled but has no assertions, so a synchronous onComplete call or other behavior regression would still pass. Variants: reduced-motion path still asserts immediate onComplete; animated path must have a meaningful expectation, preferably that onComplete is not called synchronously, or the assertion-free test is removed with a clear TODO explaining the mock limitation. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/components/common/CelebrationAnimation.test.tsx fails before the assertion/mock correction and passes after.
